site.name: HIZIR Software
site.tagline: Software that accelerates the digital transformation of businesses.

hero.title: We build your business's digital presence in one package
hero.subtitle: From QR menu to website, from register to kitchen — modern, fast, easy-to-manage solutions for your restaurant and business.

pricing.title: Clear pricing, same-day setup
pricing.subtitle: Ready-made solutions for your business; no surprise costs, no contract lock-in.
pricing.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like to get information about the {product} package.
pricing.note: Setup is free on all packages. For custom needs, message us on WhatsApp or reach us via the contact page.

products.name: QR Menu
products.description: A digital menu for your restaurant — no printing costs.

products.name: Website
products.description: A fast, SEO-friendly website built for your business.

products.name: POS System
products.description: The whole order flow, from register to kitchen, in one system.

products.name: Complete Business
products.description: QR Menu + Website + POS and more, in one package.

works.title: Our products in action
works.subtitle: The demos below mirror the exact structure of what we deliver — built with your brand and your colors.
works.pageSubtitle: Sample builds showing how our products look. Your real projects come to life with your own brand and content; our first real references will appear here as they are published.

items.title: Lezzet Durağı
items.description: A reservation-focused site for a grill restaurant: menu showcase, location, and opening hours on one screen.

items.title: Fincan Kahve
items.description: A digital menu for a boutique café: categories, item descriptions, and allergen info — price updates in seconds.

items.title: Saray Pide
items.description: A business panel for a pide house: table and takeaway orders, daily revenue, and kitchen flow in one panel.

faq.title: Questions you might have
faq.subtitle: For more, message us on WhatsApp — that's where you'll get the fastest reply.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: A QR menu and website are usually set up the same day. If your content (menu, images) is ready, going live takes a few hours; for the Complete Business package we prepare a short setup plan based on your branch/table structure.

items.question: Is a contract required?
items.answer: No. We work month to month with no long commitment. You continue as long as you're happy; to cancel, just message us on WhatsApp.

items.question: What do I do when a menu or price changes?
items.answer: Just send us the changes; price and item updates on the QR menu appear in seconds, with no printing cost. You can also manage them from your own panel if you like.

items.question: Do I own the site and content?
items.answer: Yes. The domain, content, and design are set up in your name; your menu and images are yours. You can request your records at any time.

items.question: How do we start?
items.answer: Message us on WhatsApp or fill in the contact form. We discuss your needs, pick the right package, gather content, and set it up — three steps: write, set up, publish.

items.question: How long does it take to launch a corporate website?
items.answer: It depends on scope. A small corporate site can usually go live within a few weeks; for multilingual and larger projects, we set a clear timeline together during the discovery call.

items.question: Why aren't prices listed on the site?
items.answer: Every project has a different scope, so a standard price list would be misleading. After a short discovery call, we prepare a clear, itemized quote tailored to your needs.

items.question: Who prepares the copy and visuals?
items.answer: You are the primary source of content; we guide the structure, hierarchy, and SEO. Content production support can be added to the scope separately if needed.

items.question: What happens after the site goes live?
items.answer: The site and its code belong to you. If you'd like, our maintenance, performance & SEO package covers updates, monitoring, and continuous improvement.

items.question: Can we make revisions during the design process?
items.answer: Yes. The process moves through staged approvals; we don't start development before the design is settled, so revisions happen at the right stage.

items.question: How long does an MVP take?
items.answer: It depends on scope; a focused MVP can usually launch within a few months. We set a clear timeline during the discovery call.

items.question: Who owns the code and the product?
items.answer: You do, entirely. The codebase, design, and all accounts are set up in your name; you can continue with another team at any time.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: We prefer modern, widely adopted, long-lived technologies (such as TypeScript, Next.js, and PostgreSQL) — a stack you can still easily hire developers for years from now.

items.question: What happens after the MVP?
items.answer: We review user feedback together, plan priority features, and mature the product through regular releases.

items.question: We have a half-finished project; can you take it over?
items.answer: Yes. We first audit the existing code, then tell you honestly whether continuing or restarting is more economical.

items.question: Do you use a ready-made platform or build custom?
items.answer: Both are possible depending on need. Ready-made platforms deliver fast for small catalogs; for custom workflows and high volume we recommend custom development. We decide together during discovery.

items.question: Do you take a commission on sales?
items.answer: No. Beyond the project fee we take no commission on your sales; the store and its revenue are entirely yours.

items.question: Can products from our current store be migrated?
items.answer: Yes. Products, categories, customers, and where possible order history are migrated in a planned way, with redirects set up to avoid SEO loss.

items.question: What's needed for the payment infrastructure?
items.answer: We guide you through virtual POS applications and paperwork; we handle the entire technical integration ourselves.

items.question: Do you provide support after the store opens?
items.answer: Yes. With our maintenance, performance & SEO package we can handle updates, monitoring, and preparation for campaign seasons.

websiteBuilder.title: Design Your Own Site Yourself
websiteBuilder.description: With Website Builder, you'll be able to create a site unique to your brand yourself, with a drag-and-drop interface — no coding required. Currently in development.

items.question: Is logo design included in the scope?
items.answer: Our focus is system design; we build on your existing logo. If a logo refresh is needed, we work with trusted designers or add it to the scope.

items.question: We already have a brand identity; do we start from scratch?
items.answer: No. We audit your current identity, keep what works, and systematize what's missing. The goal is order, not revolution.

items.question: What tools do you work with?
items.answer: Figma on the design side; modern web standards (CSS variables, TypeScript components) on the code side. We deliver in whatever tool your team will maintain the system with.

items.question: Can our own team maintain the system?
items.answer: Yes — that's the goal. With documentation and handoff training, your team can use and grow the system independently.

items.question: How long does a design system take to build?
items.answer: It depends on scope; a core identity system takes a few weeks, a full coded system matures over a few months. We give a clear timeline during discovery.

items.question: Another team built our site; will you still maintain it?
items.answer: Yes. We first run a technical assessment, evaluate whether the current setup is maintainable, and present a clear scope.

items.question: Do you guarantee the #1 spot in SEO?
items.answer: No — nobody can, and be wary of anyone who does. We aim for sustainable growth through measurable technical improvements, sound content structure, and regular reporting.

items.question: How fast do you respond when something breaks?
items.answer: We define clear response times per package. Critical outages get priority response; planned work follows the monthly schedule.

items.question: Is a long-term contract required?
items.answer: We work month to month; no long commitment is required. We keep working together as long as you're happy.

items.question: Is new feature development part of maintenance?
items.answer: Small changes are in scope; larger work like new pages or features is planned and priced separately. We make the boundary clear upfront.

items.question: Is your advice neutral, or are you selling your own services?
items.answer: Our consulting reports are neutral; you're not required to have us do the implementation. Your own team or another vendor can execute our recommendations.

items.question: We're a small business; isn't consulting overkill for us?
items.answer: Quite the opposite — the costliest mistakes happen where resources are tight. We shrink the scope to your needs and focus only on decisions that matter to your business.

items.question: What is the concrete deliverable?
items.answer: A written report: current state, risks, prioritized recommendations, and an actionable roadmap — delivered together with a presentation.

items.question: How is the confidentiality of our code and business protected?
items.answer: We sign an NDA before the engagement; access is used only for the duration of the assessment and with minimal permissions.

items.question: Are sessions in person or online?
items.answer: We work mostly online; on-site work can be planned when needed. Remote work speeds up the process and lowers the cost.

hero.title: Distinctive design, built with engineering discipline
hero.subtitle: HIZIR Software builds corporate websites and digital solutions for businesses — and its own technology products.

story.title: We started with one question
story.body: Not every agency project needs to be built from scratch — but not every client deserves the same design either. HIZIR Software was founded to bring these two truths together in one system: a shared, solid engineering foundation, with a distinct design identity for every project. Every step we take today is built on that same foundation.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Our goal isn't to sell every client the same design. It's to build a distinct identity and experience for every project, on top of one shared and solid engineering foundation. We pair a modern, minimal, premium design approach with a priority on SEO, performance, and long-term sustainability.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: We work toward a standard where thoughtfully designed, sustainable digital products — built to international standards — are within reach for businesses of any size.

values.title: The principles behind how we work

items.title: Shared infrastructure, distinct design
items.description: Every project is built on a solid, proven technical foundation with its own unique identity.

items.title: Performance and SEO first
items.description: Speed and search visibility aren't an afterthought — they're part of the design from day one.

items.title: Infrastructure built to grow
items.description: A multilingual, scalable architecture that doesn't need a rewrite as your business grows.

items.title: Long-term sustainability
items.description: Code is written with maintenance, growth, and future change in mind — not just today.

info.title: Reach us directly

info.processBody: We read your message and share the right next step with you by email.

map.title: Where we work
map.body: We don't have a fixed office address — our team works fully remote. The fastest way to reach us is by email or the form above.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms govern the use of the HIZIR Software website and the digital products and services we provide (including the QR Menu, Website, POS, and Complete Business packages). By using the site or our services, you are deemed to have accepted these terms.

sections.heading: Scope of services
sections.body: HIZIR Software provides QR menu, website, POS, and integrated business solutions for businesses. Package contents and prices on the site are for information; the final scope and pricing are settled by a written quote or contract with you. We reserve the right to change prices and package contents; changes do not retroactively affect existing contracts.

sections.heading: Payment and subscription
sections.body: Monthly packages are charged at the start of each period. Unpaid services may be suspended. Setup is free; upon cancellation, fees already paid for the current period are not refunded and service continues until the end of the period. To cancel, simply reach us via WhatsApp or email.

sections.heading: Content and responsibility
sections.body: You are responsible for the accuracy and currency of your business content such as menus, images, prices, and promotional copy. You may not use our services to publish unlawful content. HIZIR Software cannot be held liable for legal claims arising from content you provide.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: Unless otherwise agreed in writing at delivery, you own the right to use the site/product built specifically for you; infrastructure components, template systems, and platform code belong to HIZIR Software. The brand, design, and content of this site may not be copied without permission.

sections.heading: Service continuity
sections.body: We take reasonable care to provide services without interruption; however, outages may occur due to maintenance, updates, or third-party infrastructure. Planned maintenance is announced in advance where possible. Our liability for indirect damages (such as lost profit) is limited to the service fee paid for the relevant period.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
sections.body: These terms may be updated when necessary; the current version is always published on this page. Significant changes are additionally communicated to active customers. For questions, reach us via our WhatsApp line or by email.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for may have been moved or may never have existed.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains which personal data HIZIR Software processes through this website, for what purpose, and how. Your personal data is processed in accordance with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK, Law No. 6698).

sections.heading: What data do we collect?
sections.body: When you fill in the contact form, your full name, email address, (optional) company name, and message are transmitted to us. Your IP address at the time of submission is also recorded to prevent spam and abuse. The site has no public membership or account system; no personal data is requested outside the form.

sections.heading: What do we use the data for, and on what legal basis?
sections.body: Information submitted through the form is used solely to respond to your inquiry, contact you, and prepare a quote. The legal basis is our legitimate interest in responding to communication you initiate; the IP address relies on our legitimate interest in security and abuse prevention. No marketing messages are sent without your explicit consent; your data is not sold or shared with third parties for marketing.

sections.heading: How is the data transmitted, and where is it stored?
sections.body: Form submissions are stored in a secure database so your request can be followed up, and are also delivered to us via an email service. The infrastructure providers we use in this process (Vercel for hosting, Neon for the database, Resend for email delivery) process the data solely to provide that service. As these providers' servers may be located abroad, your data may be processed abroad under Turkish data-protection law (KVKK). Records are kept for a reasonable period to resolve your request and as part of our correspondence history; they are not retained longer unless legal obligations require it. Upon your deletion request, your records are removed from the database.

sections.heading: Cookies and analytics
sections.body: This site does not use tracking cookies. If visit statistics are collected, a cookieless analytics tool that does not gather personal data is preferred.

sections.heading: Your rights under KVKK
sections.body: Under Article 11 of KVKK, you have the right to learn whether your personal data is processed, to request information about it, and to request correction or deletion of your data.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For all privacy-related questions and requests, you can reach us at iletisim@hizirsoftware.com.
